landing.hero_subtitle: Executive coaching platform for leaders seeking real impact. Learn from the best, wherever you are.
landing.value_1_desc: Global network of certified coaches with 10+ years of Fortune 500 experience.
landing.value_2_desc: Evidence-based framework combining neuroscience, positive psychology, and systemic leadership.
landing.value_3_desc: Real-time progress tracking with verifiable performance indicators.
landing.method_1_desc: 360° assessment of your leadership style and growth areas.
landing.method_2_desc: Personalized plan with clear objectives and success metrics.
landing.method_3_desc: Structured sessions with curated content and guided practice.
landing.method_4_desc: Real-world application with continuous tracking and adjustments.
landing.map_subtitle: Connect with certified coaches in over 40 countries.
landing.testimonial_1_quote: CoachPro transformed the way I lead my team. Results were visible in less than 90 days.
landing.testimonial_2_quote: The combination of digital content and live coaching is exactly what I needed to scale.
landing.testimonial_3_quote: I never thought a digital platform could replicate the depth of an in-person coaching process.
landing.cta_subtitle: Join over 2,000 leaders who already transformed their impact.

chatbot.welcome: Hi! I'm your CoachBot. How can I help you today?
chatbot.videos_response: You can find all our videos in the 'Video Library' section of your portal. Is there a specific topic you're interested in?
chatbot.coach_response: I can connect you with a specialized coach in your area. Do you prefer coaching in leadership, communication, or personal development?
chatbot.faq_response: Most frequent questions include: program duration (3-6 months), modality (virtual/in-person), and available certifications. Can I help you with any specific one?
chatbot.mock_response: I'm your virtual coach. Remember that authentic leadership starts with self-awareness. What aspect of your leadership do you want to work on today?

footer.tagline: Transforming leaders, one coach at a time.
